# Nano Banana

> AI-powered image effects platform with 30+ creative tools. Transform photos instantly with AI.

## About

Nano Banana (easynanobanana.com) is an online AI image editing platform that provides 30+ creative AI tools for photo transformation, enhancement, and artistic effects. The platform processes images in seconds using advanced AI models. Supports 14 languages: English, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Japanese, Korean, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, Italian, Thai, Vietnamese, and Indonesian. Free credits on signup, pay-as-you-go credit model with optional subscriptions.

## AI Image Effects

### AI Background Remover
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/remove-background
- Description: Remove image backgrounds instantly using AI. Creates transparent PNG output.
- Input: Any photo (portrait, product, pet, etc.) in JPG, PNG, or WebP format up to 10MB
- Output: PNG with transparent background
- Use cases: E-commerce product photos, profile pictures, design assets, social media content

### AI Hairstyle Changer
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-hairstyle
- Description: Try different haircuts and hair colors on your photo instantly with AI.
- Input: Selfie or portrait photo
- Output: Photo with new hairstyle applied
- Use cases: Virtual salon preview, hair color experimentation, fashion content

### AI Anime Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-anime-generator
- Description: Convert photos into anime art. Create shounen heroes, Ghibli-style portraits, or cyberpunk avatars.
- Input: Any portrait or photo
- Output: Anime-style artwork
- Use cases: Social media avatars, fan art creation, anime-style profile pictures

### AI Action Figure Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-figure-generator
- Description: Transform photos into AI action figures with 3D rendering and custom packaging.
- Input: Portrait or full-body photo
- Output: Action figure style image with packaging
- Use cases: Personalized collectibles, social media content, gift ideas

### AI Clothes Changer
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-clothes-changer
- Description: Change clothes in photos instantly. Upload a photo and an outfit to visualize new looks.
- Input: Portrait photo + outfit reference image
- Output: Photo with new outfit applied
- Use cases: Fashion try-on, outfit planning, e-commerce visualization

### AI Age Filter
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-age-filter
- Description: See yourself at any age. Preview baby, teen, or elderly versions of your face.
- Input: Portrait or selfie photo
- Output: Age-transformed photo
- Use cases: Entertainment, social media content, age progression visualization

### AI Baby Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-baby-generator
- Description: Upload two parent photos and AI predicts what your baby will look like.
- Input: Two parent portrait photos
- Output: Predicted baby face image
- Use cases: Couples entertainment, social media sharing, curiosity

### AI Headshot Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-headshot-generator
- Description: Create professional headshots with AI. 10+ styles including Corporate, LinkedIn, and Creative.
- Input: Casual photo or selfie
- Output: Professional headshot photo
- Use cases: LinkedIn profiles, corporate websites, professional portfolios

### AI Makeup Filter
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-makeup
- Description: Try realistic makeup looks instantly. Preview natural, glam, smokey eye, or bridal styles.
- Input: Portrait or selfie photo
- Output: Photo with makeup applied
- Use cases: Virtual makeup try-on, beauty content, event preparation preview

### AI Beard Filter
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/beard-filter
- Description: Try realistic beard styles instantly. Preview goatee, full beard, stubble, or clean shaven looks.
- Input: Portrait or selfie photo
- Output: Photo with beard style applied
- Use cases: Grooming decisions, style experimentation, entertainment

### AI Eye Color Changer
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-eye-color
- Description: Change eye color in photos with AI. 10 realistic presets including blue, green, hazel, and amber.
- Input: Portrait photo with visible eyes
- Output: Photo with changed eye color
- Use cases: Fashion content, character design, cosmetic contact lens preview

### AI Skin Color Changer
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-skin-color
- Description: Change skin tone in photos with AI. 9 realistic presets from fair to deep.
- Input: Portrait or body photo
- Output: Photo with adjusted skin tone
- Use cases: Character design, artistic projects, visualization

### AI Face Shape Changer
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-face-shape
- Description: Transform face shape with AI. 8 shapes including oval, round, square, and heart.
- Input: Portrait or selfie photo
- Output: Photo with transformed face shape
- Use cases: Artistic portraits, character design, entertainment

### AI Smile Filter
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-smile-filter
- Description: Add natural smiles to photos. 8 smile styles including natural, big grin, and dimple.
- Input: Portrait photo
- Output: Photo with smile added
- Use cases: Fix serious expressions in photos, enhance portrait shots

### AI Open Eyes
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-open-eyes
- Description: Fix closed eyes in photos with AI. 8 natural eye styles to restore blinking moments.
- Input: Photo with closed or half-closed eyes
- Output: Photo with natural-looking open eyes
- Use cases: Fix blink photos, group photo correction, portrait enhancement

### AI Fat Filter
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-fat-filter
- Description: See yourself at different body types. Preview slim, chubby, muscular, or plus size looks.
- Input: Portrait or full-body photo
- Output: Body-type transformed photo
- Use cases: Entertainment, body visualization, social media content

### AI Muscle Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-muscle-generator
- Description: Transform photos into a muscular physique. 8 body styles: Lean Fit, Athletic, Bodybuilder, Swimmer.
- Input: Portrait or body photo
- Output: Photo with muscular physique applied
- Use cases: Fitness motivation, entertainment, social media content

### AI Body Editor
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/body-editor
- Description: Reshape and edit body proportions in photos with AI. Redefine natural curves and contours.
- Input: Full-body or portrait photo
- Output: Photo with adjusted body proportions
- Use cases: Photo retouching, fashion content, artistic editing

### AI Hug Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-hug
- Description: Generate realistic AI hug photos. Choose hug styles to create heartwarming embrace images.
- Input: Portrait photo
- Output: Photo with hug effect applied
- Use cases: Social media content, greeting cards, entertainment

### AI Nail Color Changer
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-nail-color-changer
- Description: Virtual nail try-on. Preview glossy, matte, or chrome nail colors and shapes instantly.
- Input: Hand photo
- Output: Photo with nail color/style applied
- Use cases: Nail salon preview, manicure planning, beauty content

### Virtual Jewelry Try-On
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/virtual-jewelry-try-on
- Description: Try on jewelry virtually. See how necklaces and accessories look on you with AI.
- Input: Portrait or upper body photo
- Output: Photo with jewelry applied
- Use cases: Online jewelry shopping, accessory preview, fashion content

### AI Pet Portrait
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-pet-portrait
- Description: Transform pet photos into artistic portraits. Oil painting, watercolor, Disney, and more styles.
- Input: Pet photo
- Output: Artistic pet portrait
- Use cases: Pet owner gifts, wall art, social media sharing

### AI Photo to Cartoon
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-photo-to-cartoon
- Description: Transform photos into cartoons. 8 styles including Pixar 3D, Anime, Comic Book, and Chibi.
- Input: Any photo
- Output: Cartoon-style image
- Use cases: Social media avatars, fun content, artistic transformation

### AI Photo to Sketch
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-photo-to-sketch
- Description: Convert photos to artwork. 8 styles including pencil sketch, watercolor, and oil painting.
- Input: Any photo
- Output: Sketch or artwork-style image
- Use cases: Art creation, gifts, social media content, illustration

### AI Photo Colorizer
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-photo-colorizer
- Description: Colorize black-and-white and faded photos with AI. 8 color styles available.
- Input: Black-and-white or faded photo
- Output: Colorized photo
- Use cases: Photo restoration, historical photo enhancement, family archives

### AI Vintage Photo Booth
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-vintage-photo-booth
- Description: Apply vintage filters. 8 retro styles including B&W, sepia, 70s film, and polaroid.
- Input: Any photo
- Output: Vintage-filtered photo
- Use cases: Retro aesthetic content, social media, nostalgic photo effects

### AI ASCII Art Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/ai-ascii-art-generator
- Description: Convert photos to ASCII art. 8 styles: Classic ASCII, Dot Matrix, Block Art, Emoji Mosaic.
- Input: Any photo
- Output: ASCII art version of the image
- Use cases: Developer art, retro content, creative text-based visuals

### AI Object Removal
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-image-effects/object-removal
- Description: Remove unwanted objects from photos instantly with AI. Professional results in seconds.
- Input: Photo with object to remove + mask or selection
- Output: Clean photo with object removed
- Use cases: Photo cleanup, real estate photos, product photography

### AI Infographic Generator
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-infographic-generator
- Description: Transform data and ideas into professional infographics with AI. Create charts, diagrams, and visual content.
- Input: Text data, ideas, or topics
- Output: Professional infographic image
- Use cases: Presentations, social media marketing, data visualization, educational content

### AI Prompt Assistant
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/ai-prompt-assistant
- Description: AI-powered prompt gallery and enhancement tool with 600+ expert prompts for portraits, logos, products, and illustrations.
- Input: Basic text prompt or idea
- Output: Enhanced, optimized AI prompt
- Use cases: Prompt engineering, AI art generation, creative inspiration

## Pricing

- Free: Credits on signup, daily check-in rewards (1 credit/day)
- Referral program: Earn credits by inviting friends
- Credit packs: One-time purchases (Starter, Creator, Pro, Master packs)
- Subscriptions: Monthly plans from Basic to Max with increasing credits and features
- Most tools cost 1-2 credits per use
- Preview downloads are free, full resolution requires credits
- URL: https://www.easynanobanana.com/pricing
